title: Reign SMP Season 1 Texture Pack
description: The Official Reign SMP Season 1 Texture Pack! Plugin May Come out soon for public use.
body:
This is the **Reign SMP Season One** Texture Pack! [Discord](https://discord.gg/p6pShdAfkR)
Reign SMP is an SMP With custom abilities using totems. These custom totems give you abilities such as becoming immortal, flying, to even giving Glowing to players nearby.
Please do not steal this!
